reviews.review_description: immediately as i got the game my game was laggy as Neck the mods were okay but immediately as i joined a lobby nobody was in it so when i joined another lobby there were these three people that literally just joined the game and then there was a kid who decided to report me for playing the game and i got banned

reviews.review_title: It absolutely sucks, don't get it.
reviews.review_description: i joined the game, and i almost instantly saw part of what was supposed to be tutoriol was bugged. I tried to ignore it and go into a public lobby, but when i tried some of the mods, apparently the mods i was testing out were bannable, i wasn't told by anyone, and the moderator banned me instantly. I then procced to try the other mods such as the mono sandbox, sythe songs menu, the sythe client menu, and the fn emote wheel. Most of those mods didn't even work, so overall just don't get this game, it sucks.

This gtag copy is just the best.
1st. You get 3 mod menus and 1 like music menu
2nd. Some staff is pretty good, others sometimes false report
3. The quality and fps is just too good for a copy

reviews.review_title: Very good game i like the mods they have
reviews.review_description: I really like the mod menus the staffs are great and the game is really fun and there's alot to do in this game
Best thing in the whole universe it’s so fun with mods and a great community everyone is nice and mods ar3 helpful
Mods great staff very active and join there discord you can get finger painter and all sorts of custom add on,s!

I was in a lobby with like 6 other people when a modder joined. I recognized who it was  and was like "oh hows it going?", banned. It was for 12 hours, i check back after like 2 hours to see if it was undone, 24 hours. He somehow extended the ban?!
This game is honestly the best it has great staff funny community and active people I am an owner you should go ahead and check this game!
